name: @kuiralabs/kuira-starter-counter
description: Counter — the universal Hello World of smart contracts, in Compact. Compiled artifacts under src/managed/counter/ are consumed by the Android app via the io.github.kuiralabs.contract Gradle plugin.

scripts.deploy:localnet: mn contract deploy --managed src/managed/counter --wallet dev-alice --network undeployed
scripts.call:increment:localnet: mn contract call --circuit increment --managed src/managed/counter --wallet dev-alice --network undeployed
